S.FORM: mama, mwani lga,
S.PHON: mama, mwani lɣa,
S.FORM: mama, mwani lga,
S.PHON: mama, mwani lɣa,

S.FORM: aring pqzyu' cikay yaw na qnxal su llaqi' su ga, la
S.PHON: ariŋ pqzjuʔ ʦikaj jaw na qnxal su llaqiʔ su ɣa, la
S.FORM: aring pqzyu' cikay yaw na qnxal su llaqi' su ga, la
S.PHON: ariŋ pqzjuʔ ʦ~ʨikaj jaw na qnxal s~ɕu llaqiʔ s~ɕu ɣa, la

S.FORM: ryax na rkyasan su laqi su cipoq
S.PHON: rjax na rkjasan su laqi su ʦipoq
S.FORM: ryax na rkyasan su laqi su cipoq
S.PHON: rjax na rkjas~ɕan s~ɕu laqi s~ɕu ʦ~ʨipoq

S.FORM: a~qnxan son mha i
S.PHON: a~qnxan son mħa i
S.FORM: a~qnxan son mha i
S.PHON: a~qnxan s~ɕon mħa i

S.FORM: mluw saku yaya mu qani ga ne
S.PHON: mluw saku jaja mu qani ɣa ne
S.FORM: mluw saku yaya mu qani ga ne
S.PHON: mluw s~ɕaku jaja mu qani ɣa ne

S.FORM: raral ga son mha i sami qalang Piyanan ga
S.PHON: raral ɣa son mħa i sami qalaŋ pijanan ɣa
S.FORM: raral ga son mha i sami qalang Piyanan ga
S.PHON: raral ɣa s~ɕon mħa i s~ɕami qalaŋ pijanan ɣa

S.FORM: si ktay son mha, qnxan son mha qalang ga siktay rigyax balay
S.PHON: si ktaj son mħa, qnxan son mħa qalaŋ ɣa siktaj riɣjax β~valaj
S.FORM: si ktay son mha, qnxan son mha qalang ga siktay rigyax balay
S.PHON: s~ɕi ktaj s~ɕon mħa, qnxan s~ɕon mħa qalaŋ ɣa s~ɕiktaj riɣjax βalaj

S.FORM: ungat hanten nya ungat renki nya
S.PHON: uŋat ħanten nja uŋat renki nja
S.FORM: ungat hanten nya ungat renki nya
S.PHON: uŋat ħanten nja uŋat renki nja

S.FORM: qutux kawas ga mha nanu qutux kawas ga, si ktay qutux kawas mnaki lga new
S.PHON: qutux kawas ɣa mħa nanu qutux kawas ɣa, si ktaj qutux kawas mnaki lɣa new
S.FORM: qutux kawas ga mha nanu qutux kawas ga, si ktay qutux kawas mnaki lga new
S.PHON: qutux kawas~ɕ ɣa mħa nanu qutux kawas~ɕ ɣa, s~ɕi ktaj qutux kawas~ɕ mnaki lɣa new

S.FORM: ungat renki kryax pi,
S.PHON: uŋat renki krjax pi,
S.FORM: ungat renki kryax pi,
S.PHON: uŋat renki krjax pi,

S.FORM: kya mha nanu'? aring qnxan maku lga ne
S.PHON: kja mħa nanuʔ? ariŋ qnxan maku lɣa ne
S.FORM: kya mha nanu'? aring qnxan maku lga ne
S.PHON: kja mħa nanuʔ? ariŋ qnxan maku lɣa ne

S.FORM: kya ku ninense lga. maki tuqi nya mama?maki tuqiy la khngyan la?
S.PHON: kja ku ninense lɣa. maki tuqi nja mama?maki tuqij la kħŋjan la?
S.FORM: kya ku ninense lga. maki tuqi nya mama?maki tuqiy la khngyan la?
S.PHON: kja ku ninens~ɕe lɣa. maki tuqi nja mama?maki tuqij la kħŋjan la?

S.FORM: tuqi nya raral hiya ga ne, monray ga ne
S.PHON: tuqi nja raral ħija ɣa ne, monraj ɣa ne
S.FORM: tuqi nya raral hiya ga ne, monray ga ne
S.PHON: tuqi nja raral ħija ɣa ne, monraj ɣa ne

S.FORM: laqi saku qani ga ne, rima maki kya Gipun la. rima maki kya Gipun hiya lga. rima maki kya Gipun hiya lga, sono toki rewa
S.PHON: laqi saku qani ɣa ne, rima maki kja ɣipun la. rima maki kja ɣipun ħija lɣa. rima maki kja ɣipun ħija lɣa, sono toki rewa
S.FORM: laqi saku qani ga ne, rima maki kya Gipun la. rima maki kya Gipun hiya lga. rima maki kya Gipun hiya lga, sono toki rewa
S.PHON: laqi s~ɕaku qani ɣa ne, rima maki kja ɣipun la. rima maki kja ɣipun ħija lɣa. rima maki kja ɣipun ħija lɣa, s~ɕono toki rewa

S.FORM: t'aring saku mqwas ga, t'aring balay mqwas ga
S.PHON: tʔariŋ saku mqwas ɣa, tʔariŋ β~valaj mqwas ɣa
S.FORM: t'aring saku mqwas ga, t'aring balay mqwas ga
S.PHON: tʔariŋ s~ɕaku mqwas~ɕ ɣa, tʔariŋ βalaj mqwas~ɕ ɣa

S.FORM: socugyo gluw nisang maku, layikay no t'aring mqwas
S.PHON: soʦuɣjo ɣluw nisaŋ maku, lajikaj no tʔariŋ mqwas
S.FORM: socugyo gluw nisang maku, layikay no t'aring mqwas
S.PHON: s~ɕoʦ~ʨuɣjo ɣluw nis~ɕaŋ maku, lajikaj no tʔariŋ mqwas~ɕ

S.FORM: mqwas yanay maku ga, cbaqan Gipun
S.PHON: mqwas janaj maku ɣa, ʦβ~vaqan ɣipun
S.FORM: mqwas yanay maku ga, cbaqan Gipun
S.PHON: mqwas~ɕ janaj maku ɣa, ʦ~ʨβaqan ɣipun

S.FORM: rokume, rokunensey lga socugyo rwa, aw. rokunensey lga socugyo
S.PHON: rokume, rokunensej lɣa soʦuɣjo rwa, aw. rokunensej lɣa soʦuɣjo
S.FORM: rokume, rokunensey lga socugyo rwa, aw. rokunensey lga socugyo
S.PHON: rokume, rokunens~ɕej lɣa s~ɕoʦ~ʨuɣjo rwa, aw. rokunens~ɕej lɣa s~ɕoʦ~ʨuɣjo

S.FORM: ga qsuyan maku ga, ini ga, galan nihon ziray no senen lancyo
S.PHON: ɣa qsujan maku ɣa, ini ɣa, ɣalan niħon ziraj no senen lanʦjo
S.FORM: ga qsuyan maku ga, ini ga, galan nihon ziray no senen lancyo
S.PHON: ɣa qs~ɕujan maku ɣa, ini ɣa, ɣalan niħon ziraj no s~ɕenen lanʦ~ʨjo

S.FORM: qsuyan maku ruw, nesan mu ga senen
S.PHON: qsujan maku ruw, nesan mu ɣa senen
S.FORM: qsuyan maku ruw, nesan mu ga senen
S.PHON: qs~ɕujan maku ruw, nes~ɕan mu ɣa s~ɕenen

S.FORM: xuzing kay...xuzing
S.PHON: xuziŋ kaj...xuziŋ
S.FORM: xuzing kay...xuzing
S.PHON: xuziŋ kaj...xuziŋ

S.FORM: sanbano kaycyo. nanu' qasa? nanu. p'agan laqi'. p'agan nanu'. xuzing. 婦人.
S.PHON: sanβ~vano kajʦjo. nanuʔ qasa? nanu. pʔaɣan laqiʔ. pʔaɣan nanuʔ. xuziŋ. **.
S.FORM: sanbano kaycyo. nanu' qasa? nanu. p'agan laqi'. p'agan nanu'. xuzing. 婦人.
S.PHON: s~ɕanβano kajʦ~ʨjo. nanuʔ qas~ɕa? nanu. pʔaɣan laqiʔ. pʔaɣan nanuʔ. xuziŋ. **.

S.FORM: han han ! p'agan laqi' ga. aw. qsuyan su kneril ga. musa kosyuw ay. han.
S.PHON: ħan ħan ! pʔaɣan laqiʔ ɣa. aw. qsujan su kneril ɣa. musa kosjuw aj. ħan.
S.FORM: han han ! p'agan laqi' ga. aw. qsuyan su kneril ga. musa kosyuw ay. han.
S.PHON: ħan ħan ! pʔaɣan laqiʔ ɣa. aw. qs~ɕujan s~ɕu kneril ɣa. mus~ɕa kos~ɕjuw aj. ħan.

S.FORM: slaqi ga hiya magal kwara laqi pi. m..m. maki saku kya ruw
S.PHON: slaqi ɣa ħija maɣal kwara laqi pi. m..m. maki saku kja ruw
S.FORM: slaqi ga hiya magal kwara laqi pi. m..m. maki saku kya ruw
S.PHON: s~ɕlaqi ɣa ħija maɣal kwara laqi pi. m..m. maki s~ɕaku kja ruw

S.FORM: ga ktan maku qsuyan rwa qani ga laqi qasa ga slaqi..
S.PHON: ɣa ktan maku qsujan rwa qani ɣa laqi qasa ɣa slaqi..
S.FORM: ga ktan maku qsuyan rwa qani ga laqi qasa ga slaqi..
S.PHON: ɣa ktan maku qs~ɕujan rwa qani ɣa laqi qas~ɕa ɣa s~ɕlaqi..

S.FORM: laqi saku ga, yaqih saku ga
S.PHON: laqi saku ɣa, jaqiħ saku ɣa
S.FORM: laqi saku ga, yaqih saku ga
S.PHON: laqi s~ɕaku ɣa, jaqiħ s~ɕaku ɣa

S.FORM: kbalay na utux, hopa' roziq ruw, yaqih kako mu uzi ru
S.PHON: kβ~valaj na utux, ħopaʔ roziq ruw, jaqiħ kako mu uzi ru
S.FORM: kbalay na utux, hopa' roziq ruw, yaqih kako mu uzi ru
S.PHON: kβalaj na utux, ħopaʔ roziq ruw, jaqiħ kako mu uzi ru

S.FORM: ana ima laqi ga sm'yaqih knan raral. han.
S.PHON: ana ima laqi ɣa smʔjaqiħ knan raral. ħan.
S.FORM: ana ima laqi ga sm'yaqih knan raral. han.
S.PHON: ana ima laqi ɣa s~ɕmʔjaqiħ knan raral. ħan.

S.FORM: ga kngun nha Ingus
S.PHON: ɣa kŋun nħa iŋus
S.FORM: ga kngun nha Ingus
S.PHON: ɣa kŋun nħa iŋus~ɕ

S.FORM: baha icu laqi tayal hiya ga
S.PHON: β~vaħa iʦu laqi tajal ħija ɣa
S.FORM: baha icu laqi tayal hiya ga
S.PHON: βaħa iʦ~ʨu laqi tajal ħija ɣa

S.FORM: kya qu cinmuyaw squliq ga, blaq lukus laqi nha ru
S.PHON: kja qu ʦinmujaw squliq ɣa, β~vlaq lukus laqi nħa ru
S.FORM: kya qu cinmuyaw squliq ga, blaq lukus laqi nha ru
S.PHON: kja qu ʦ~ʨinmujaw s~ɕquliq ɣa, βlaq lukus~ɕ laqi nħa ru

S.FORM: bali bazi lpi, tninun yaba nha tninun yaya nha, cece' nha. cece' nha.
S.PHON: β~vali β~vazi lpi, tninun jaβ~va nħa tninun jaja nħa, ʦeʦeʔ nħa. ʦeʦeʔ nħa.
S.FORM: bali bazi lpi, tninun yaba nha tninun yaya nha, cece' nha. cece' nha.
S.PHON: βali βazi lpi, tninun jaβa nħa tninun jaja nħa, ʦ~ʨeʦ~ʨeʔ nħa. ʦ~ʨeʦ~ʨeʔ nħa.

S.FORM: ru kya lokah mqumah ga ne, maki ga
S.PHON: ru kja lokaħ mqumaħ ɣa ne, maki ɣa
S.FORM: ru kya lokah mqumah ga ne, maki ga
S.PHON: ru kja lokaħ mqumaħ ɣa ne, maki ɣa

S.FORM: kya cyux kya ru maki ngahi nha uzi pi
S.PHON: kja ʦjux kja ru maki ŋaħi nħa uzi pi
S.FORM: kya cyux kya ru maki ngahi nha uzi pi
S.PHON: kja ʦ~ʨjux kja ru maki ŋaħi nħa uzi pi

S.FORM: kwara ga ungat son mha ini klokah mqumah, mqumah kwara ga mnbu' ru
S.PHON: kwara ɣa uŋat son mħa ini klokaħ mqumaħ, mqumaħ kwara ɣa mnβ~vuʔ ru
S.FORM: kwara ga ungat son mha ini klokah mqumah, mqumah kwara ga mnbu' ru
S.PHON: kwara ɣa uŋat s~ɕon mħa ini klokaħ mqumaħ, mqumaħ kwara ɣa mnβuʔ ru

S.FORM: mnbu' i katey
S.PHON: mnβ~vuʔ i katej
S.FORM: mnbu' i katey
S.PHON: mnβuʔ i katej

S.FORM: myaqih qani ga skruy kya ruma ga, aring kya tninun pi,
S.PHON: mjaqiħ qani ɣa skruj kja ruma ɣa, ariŋ kja tninun pi,
S.FORM: myaqih qani ga skruy kya ruma ga, aring kya tninun pi,
S.PHON: mjaqiħ qani ɣa s~ɕkruj kja ruma ɣa, ariŋ kja tninun pi,

S.FORM: m'yangi kwara cingasal. aw myangi kya kwara pi, kya qu mlokah hi ga ne,
S.PHON: mʔjaŋi kwara ʦiŋasal. aw mjaŋi kja kwara pi, kja qu mlokaħ ħi ɣa ne,
S.FORM: m'yangi kwara cingasal. aw myangi kya kwara pi, kya qu mlokah hi ga ne,
S.PHON: mʔjaŋi kwara ʦ~ʨiŋas~ɕal. aw mjaŋi kja kwara pi, kja qu mlokaħ ħi ɣa ne,

S.FORM: lokah mqumah ru qutux kawas knloh nha ga ne
S.PHON: lokaħ mqumaħ ru qutux kawas knloħ nħa ɣa ne
S.FORM: lokah mqumah ru qutux kawas knloh nha ga ne
S.PHON: lokaħ mqumaħ ru qutux kawas~ɕ knloħ nħa ɣa ne

S.FORM: wa!qutux khu' ruma
S.PHON: wa!qutux kħuʔ ruma
S.FORM: wa!qutux khu' ruma
S.PHON: wa!qutux kħuʔ ruma
